seoTitle: Situations : product & technical support | Luc Rousseau
seoDescription: Two quick questions to find the page that fits your situation: tech team, PM/PO, live product, SaaS MVP, or product AI.
title: Which situation fits you?
lede:
In under a minute, find the page that matches your context: fractional product and technical support in Quebec.

Seven profiles covered: post-funding and first dev hire, solo developer, fractional PM or PO, phased rebuild, editorial platform, SaaS MVP, and product AI with guardrails.

q1.question: Which situation sounds most like you today?

team.question: On the technical side, what fits you best?

live.question: For this live product, your main priority is…

launch.question: For this launch, you're mainly looking to…

team.label: Strengthen the technical team
team.hint: First dev hire after funding, or one developer carrying everything

product.label: Structure product leadership (PM / PO)
product.hint: Priorities, roadmap, prerequisites, dev alignment, without a full-time role

live.label: Evolve a product already in production
live.hint: Rebuild, editorial platform at scale, or AI in what you already ship

launch.label: Launch something new
launch.hint: MVP or SaaS, or an offer where AI is central

first-hire.label: Post-funding, before your first full-time developer
first-hire.hint: Product priorities, backlog, and fractional senior vs first hire within the same budget band

solo-dev.label: One developer carries all technical responsibility
solo-dev.hint: Reduce bus factor, day-to-day relief, vacation coverage

rebuild.label: Rebuild or change stack
rebuild.hint: Phasing and architecture without big bang or running the team day to day

editorial.label: Run an editorial product at scale
editorial.hint: Comparator, multi-brand, content and business journeys, not a brochure site

ai-live.label: Clarify AI in your existing product
ai-live.hint: Where it fits, guardrails, POC before you commit to build

mvp.label: Frame an MVP or SaaS before building big
mvp.hint: Feasibility, stack, scope, and prerequisites for your devs or agency

ai-launch.label: Launch an AI-centric offer
ai-launch.hint: Product and technical decisions, not a checkbox « we have AI » feature

premier-dev-fractionnel.title: Post-funding: before your first full-time developer
premier-dev-fractionnel.teaser: You're weighing a first technical hire : here's how two days a week with a senior principal developer who builds can clarify priorities, backlog, and delivery, often better than a first junior hire within a comparable budget.

dev-unique-backup.title: One developer carries all technical responsibility
dev-unique-backup.teaser: Senior backup 1 day/week: reachable on weekdays, emergency coverage, Laravel, React, WordPress alignment, without hiring a second full-time developer.

product-manager-fractionnel.title: PM or PO need, without full-time
product-manager-fractionnel.teaser: You need real product leadership, not a 40-hour seat : here's how dense fractional PM covers priorities, prerequisites, and ceremonies.

refonte-produit-par-phases.title: Product rebuild or stack change
refonte-produit-par-phases.teaser: You need to modernize without stopping everything : here's feasibility, phasing, and architecture without becoming your team's tech lead.

plateforme-editoriale-produit.title: Editorial product at scale
plateforme-editoriale-produit.teaser: Comparator, multi-brand, or content that drives the product : here's a platform built for editorial pace, not ad-hoc integrations every launch.

mvp-saas-faisabilite.title: Launching a SaaS or MVP
mvp-saas-faisabilite.teaser: You want a clear map before months of dev : here's feasibility, stack, prototypes, and handover to your devs or agency.

ia-produit-garde-fous.title: AI in your product
ia-produit-garde-fous.teaser: « We need AI » pressure without a clear frame : here's where it fits, guardrails, and a POC before prod.
